name: open_animation_tool
description: Open the Animation Tool pre-configured for a layer, time range, and region so the user can export a GIF or MP4 with one click.

layer_name.description: Display name of the layer to animate.

start_date.description: Animation start date in ISO format (e.g. '2024-01-01'). Defaults to the layer's earliest available date.

end_date.description: Animation end date in ISO format (e.g. '2024-12-31'). Defaults to the layer's latest available date.

region.description: Named geographic region (e.g. 'Beaufort Sea', 'Gulf of Mexico') or 'current view'.
